attributes.description: Overview of Incident Data Sent using BeyondTrust ISI Native Elastic Push.

params.markdown:
This dashboard provides visibility into events generated by BeyondTrust ISI.

It includes a key metric highlights the **Total Incidents**. A pie chart shows **Incidents by Severity**, while a bar chart visualizes **Incidents by Rule Version**. A table provides details on **Top Impacted Entities**, and another pie chart shows **Incidents by Code**.

Together, these visualizations help monitor event trends and analyze impacted entities efficiently.

**[Integration Page](/app/integrations/detail/beyondtrust_isi/overview)**

attributes.title: [Logs BeyondTrust ISI] Incident (Elastic Push)
